purpose: Define typed task signals used by the operating-model loader before selecting bundles.

signals.description: Any task that may read, write, validate, branch or open a pull request in the repository.
Default ResearchOps public-sector product assurance context.
The task concerns frontend UI, service content, page composition, forms or accessibility.
The task concerns Cloudflare runtime, deployment, routing, bindings, storage, state or infrastructure behaviour.
The task concerns Airtable records, data, linked records, formula filters or attachments.
The task concerns Mural collaboration, OAuth, rooms, boards, widgets or sticky notes.
